visuals.title: 2D Array Memory Layout
visuals.description: Visual diagram for 2D Array Memory Layout
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Two-Dimensional Arrays</text>

  <!-- Main grid structure -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="200" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Grid rows -->
  <line x1="60" y1="110" x2="360" y2="110" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="60" y1="160" x2="360" y2="160" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="60" y1="210" x2="360" y2="210" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Grid columns -->
  <line x1="135" y1="60" x2="135" y2="260" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="60" x2="210" y2="260" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="285" y1="60" x2="285" y2="260" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Array elements -->
  <rect x="70" y="70" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="97.5" y="89" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [0][0]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="145" y="70" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="172.5" y="89" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [0][1]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="220" y="70" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="247.5" y="89" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [0][2]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="295" y="70" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="322.5" y="89" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [0][3]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Row 2 -->
  <rect x="70" y="120" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="97.5" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [1][0]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="145" y="120" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="172.5" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [1][1]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="220" y="120" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="247.5" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [1][2]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="295" y="120" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="322.5" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [1][3]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" extreme="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Row 3 -->
  <rect x="70" y="170" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="97.5" y="189" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [2][0]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="145" y="170" width="55" height="30" extreme="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="172.5" y="189" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [2][1]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="220" y="170" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="247.5" y="189" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [2][2]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="295" y="170" width="55" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="322.5" y="189" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [2][3]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="30" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Row 0
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="30" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Row 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="30" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Row 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="极" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="97.5" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Col 0
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="172.5" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Col 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="247.5" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Col 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="322.5" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Col 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
